title: Incorrect Results for Comparison Operators on inet Datatype
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE network (address VARCHAR(39) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO network VALUES ('172.16.0.1', 'Another Private Network');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM network WHERE address BETWEEN '10.0.0.0' AND '192.168.1.255';
key_bug_features: Comparison operators on inet datatype yield incorrect results
